title: Org Design in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger org design in practice judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Org Design in Practice is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Org Design in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good org design in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Org Design in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
